verses.text: After the men fall in war, seven women will cling to one man for a name; yet 'the branch of the LORD' shall be beautiful and glorious. Beyond judgment shines hope. The Branch is Christ, the beauty and fruit of God's grace for the remnant.

After the men fall in war, seven women will cling to one man for a name; yet 'the branch of the LORD' shall be beautiful and glorious. Beyond judgment shines hope. The Branch is Christ, the beauty and fruit of God's grace for the remnant.

The survivor in Zion shall be called holy, when the Lord has washed away the filth of the daughters of Zion 'by the spirit of judgment, and... of burning.' Purging precedes holiness. God cleanses His people through refining fire.

The survivor in Zion shall be called holy, when the Lord has washed away the filth of the daughters of Zion 'by the spirit of judgment, and... of burning.' Purging precedes holiness. God cleanses His people through refining fire.

The LORD will spread over His dwelling a cloud by day and fire by night, a canopy and shelter from storm and heat. His presence guards the purified. As in the wilderness, God covers His people with His own protecting glory.

The LORD will spread over His dwelling a cloud by day and fire by night, a canopy and shelter from storm and heat. His presence guards the purified. As in the wilderness, God covers His people with His own protecting glory.
